Uses of Package
org.apache.juneau.marshall.jena

Packages that use org.apache.juneau.marshall.jena
Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.marshall.jena
RDF Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.jena.marshaller
 
  • Classes in org.apache.juneau.marshall.jena used by org.apache.juneau.marshall.jena
    Class
    Description
    JsonLdParser
    Subclass of RdfParser for parsing JSON-LD into POJOs.
    JsonLdSerializer
    Subclass of RdfSerializer for serializing POJOs to JSON-LD format.
    N3Parser
    Subclass of RdfParser for parsing N3 (Notation3) into POJOs.
    N3Serializer
    Subclass of RdfSerializer for serializing POJOs to N3 (Notation3) format.
    NQuadsParser
    Subclass of RdfParser for parsing N-Quads into POJOs.
    NQuadsSerializer
    Subclass of RdfSerializer for serializing POJOs to N-Quads format.
    NTripleParser
    Subclass of RdfParser for parsing N-Triples into POJOs.
    NTripleSerializer
    Subclass of RdfSerializer for serializing POJOs to N-Triples notation.
    Rdf
    Annotation for specifying options for RDF serializers.
    RdfAnnotation.Builder
    Builder class.
    RdfApply
    Dynamically applies a @Rdf annotation to specified classes, methods, or fields.
    RdfApplyAnnotation.Builder
    Builder class.
    RdfBeanMeta
    Metadata on beans specific to the RDF serializers and parsers pulled from the @Rdf annotation on the class.
    RdfBeanPropertyMeta
    Metadata on bean properties specific to the RDF serializers and parsers pulled from the @Rdf annotation on the bean property.
    RdfClassMeta
    Metadata on classes specific to the RDF serializers and parsers pulled from the @Rdf annotation on the class.
    RdfCollectionFormat
    Used in conjunction with the @Rdf(collectionFormat) annotation to fine-tune how classes, beans, and bean properties are serialized, particularly collections.
    RdfConfig
    Annotation for specifying config properties defined in XmlSerializer, XmlDocSerializer, and XmlParser.
    RdfJsonParser
    Subclass of RdfParser for parsing RDF/JSON into POJOs.
    RdfJsonSerializer
    Subclass of RdfSerializer for serializing POJOs to RDF/JSON notation.
    RdfMetaProvider
    Interface for providing access to RdfClassMeta, RdfBeanMeta, and RdfBeanPropertyMeta objects.
    RdfParser
    Parses RDF into POJOs.
    RdfParser.Builder
    Builder class.
    RdfParser.DefaultBuilder
    Concrete default builder leaf for the non-subclassed RdfParser.create() / RdfParser.copy() path.
    RdfParserSession
    Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of RdfParser.
    RdfParserSession.Builder
    Builder class.
    RdfProtoParser
    Stream-based RDF parser for RDF/PROTO binary format.
    RdfProtoSerializer
    Stream-based RDF serializer for RDF/PROTO binary format.
    RdfSerializer
    Serializes POJOs to RDF.
    RdfSerializer.Builder
    Builder class.
    RdfSerializer.DefaultBuilder
    Concrete default builder leaf for the non-subclassed RdfSerializer.create() / RdfSerializer.copy() path.
    RdfSerializerSession
    Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of RdfSerializer.
    RdfSerializerSession.Builder
    Builder class.
    RdfStreamParser
    Stream-based RDF parser for binary formats (RDF/THRIFT, RDF/PROTO).
    RdfStreamParser.Builder
    Builder class.
    RdfStreamParser.DefaultBuilder
    Concrete default builder leaf for the non-subclassed RdfStreamParser.create() / RdfStreamParser.copy() path.
    RdfStreamParserSession
    Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of RdfStreamParser.
    RdfStreamParserSession.Builder
    Builder class.
    RdfStreamSerializer
    Stream-based RDF serializer for binary formats (RDF/THRIFT, RDF/PROTO).
    RdfStreamSerializer.Builder
    Builder class.
    RdfStreamSerializer.DefaultBuilder
    Concrete default builder leaf for the non-subclassed RdfStreamSerializer.create() / RdfStreamSerializer.copy() path.
    RdfStreamSerializerSession
    Session for stream-based RDF serialization (binary formats like RDF/THRIFT, RDF/PROTO).
    RdfStreamSerializerSession.Builder
    Builder class.
    RdfThriftParser
    Stream-based RDF parser for RDF/THRIFT binary format.
    RdfThriftSerializer
    Stream-based RDF serializer for RDF/THRIFT binary format.
    RdfXmlAbbrevSerializer
    Subclass of RdfSerializer for serializing POJOs to RDF/XML-Abbrev (abbreviated XML notation).
    RdfXmlParser
    Subclass of RdfParser for parsing RDF/XML into POJOs.
    RdfXmlSerializer
    Subclass of RdfSerializer for serializing POJOs to RDF/XML (standard XML notation).
    TriGParser
    Subclass of RdfParser for parsing TriG into POJOs.
    TriGSerializer
    Subclass of RdfSerializer for serializing POJOs to TriG format.
    TriXParser
    Subclass of RdfParser for parsing TriX (XML) into POJOs.
    TriXSerializer
    Subclass of RdfSerializer for serializing POJOs to TriX (XML) format.
    TurtleParser
    Subclass of RdfParser for parsing Turtle into POJOs.
    TurtleSerializer
    Subclass of RdfSerializer for serializing POJOs to Turtle format.

    NQuadsSerializer

    NTripleSerializer

    RdfJsonParser
    Subclass of RdfParser for parsing RDF/JSON into POJOs.
    RdfJsonSerializer
    Subclass of RdfSerializer for serializing POJOs to RDF/JSON notation.
    RdfProtoParser
    Stream-based RDF parser for RDF/PROTO binary format.
    RdfProtoSerializer
    Stream-based RDF serializer for RDF/PROTO binary format.
    RdfThriftParser
    Stream-based RDF parser for RDF/THRIFT binary format.
    RdfThriftSerializer
    Stream-based RDF serializer for RDF/THRIFT binary format.
    RdfXmlAbbrevSerializer
    Subclass of RdfSerializer for serializing POJOs to RDF/XML-Abbrev (abbreviated XML notation).
    RdfXmlParser
    Subclass of RdfParser for parsing RDF/XML into POJOs.
    RdfXmlSerializer
    Subclass of RdfSerializer for serializing POJOs to RDF/XML (standard XML notation).
    TriGParser
    Subclass of RdfParser for parsing TriG into POJOs.
    TriGSerializer
    Subclass of RdfSerializer for serializing POJOs to TriG format.
    TriXParser
    Subclass of RdfParser for parsing TriX (XML) into POJOs.
    TriXSerializer
    Subclass of RdfSerializer for serializing POJOs to TriX (XML) format.
    TurtleParser
    Subclass of RdfParser for parsing Turtle into POJOs.
    TurtleSerializer
    Subclass of RdfSerializer for serializing POJOs to Turtle format.
